reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 빨간색 리쉬는 시중에 컬러가 잘 없는데 봄여름에 잘 어울리게 알록달록 귀여운 패턴이라서 오픈하자마자 이거다!!하고 바로 구매했어요!!! 컬러감도 좋고 옷을 잘 안입혀서 포인트로도 좋은 것 같아요 바잇미 리쉬는 전부 되게 부드럽고 매끈한?? 그립감도 좋은데 까칠까칠 하지 않아서 울 강쥐도 저도 제일 애정합니다 ㅎㅎ 가벼운 웨빙으로 핸즈프리 나온 것도 너무 좋아요! 산책친구들도 많이 물어봐서 제가 홍보 좀 했슴니당ㅋㅎ
reviews.content_en: The red leash is hard to find in stores, but it has such a cute, colorful pattern that's perfect for spring and summer—I bought it right away!!! 😍 The color looks great and since my pup doesn't wear clothes much, it's perfect as an accent piece. BITE ME leashes are all so soft and smooth with a great grip, and they're not rough at all, so my strong boy and I absolutely love it ㅎㅎ I'm also really happy with the lightweight webbing on the hands-free option! So many dog friends on walks have asked about it that I've been doing some promoting lol

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 가슴42인데 요즘 더워서 산책을 안했더니 살쪄서 더 큰거같아요 M사이즈로 최대로 줄여서 착용했더니 잘 맞아요 원래 다른제품 사려다가 색이랑 패턴이 너무 이뻐서 그만...충동구매를 했는데 정말 산뜻해서 완전맘에들고요 기존에 갖고있던 하네스보다는 딱봐도 마감이나 완성도가 좋아보여서 잘산것같아요
reviews.content_en: My pup's chest is 42cm, and since it's been hot and we haven't been walking much, she's put on some weight so it looks bigger now. I adjusted the M size to the tightest setting and it fits perfectly. I was originally going to buy a different product, but the color and pattern were so pretty I ended up impulse buying... and I'm so glad I did! It looks so fresh and I love it. The finishing and overall quality definitely look better than my previous harness.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 여름에는 하네스보다 목줄이 덜 더울 거 같아서 구매했습니다 상큼한 색상이 마음에 들어요 :.) 가볍고 튼튼하고 너비가 넓어 목에 무리가 덜 가겠어요 처음 사용해 보는거라 적응할 시간이 필요하겠습니다 잘 사용해 봏게요!🥹
reviews.content_en: I bought this leash instead of a harness since it's less hot in summer. I love the fresh color! 🙂 It's lightweight, durable, and the wide width means less strain on the neck. Since it's my first time using this type, I'll need some time for my pup to adjust. Looking forward to using it! 🥹

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 하네스 먼저 구입후 너무 이뻐서 셋투로 맞추고싶어성 결국 리쉬도 따로 구입함ㅋㅋ고리부분이 넓어서 더 안전하게 느껴지고좀 두껍고 마감도 짱짱해요 뭣보다 색상이 쨍해서 진짜 이뿌용
reviews.content_en: I bought the harness first and loved it so much that I wanted to match the set, so I ended up buying the leash separately too lol The wide ring part feels safer and it's thick with great finishing. And the color is so vibrant—it's really pretty!

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 상큼함 색상과 컬러풀한 디자인 너무너무 귀여워요 매끄러운 재질이라 때타는것도 잘 안보일 것 같아요 목둘레 27센티 정도의 푸들인데 스몰 사이즈 잘 맞습니다!
reviews.content_en: The fresh color and colorful design are so so cute! The smooth material means dirt won't show easily. My poodle is about 27cm around the neck and the small size fits perfectly!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 1살 8개월 똥꼬발랄 강아지 입니당! 자동리드줄 사용하다가 위험하다는 글 보고 구매했는데 편하고 좋아요ㅎㅎ 핸즈프리형태다 보니 겨울에 더 유용할거 같네요~ 레드색상도 예뻐서 고민되네요˃̵͈̑ ᴗ ˂̵͈̑
reviews.content_en: I have a 1-year-8-month energetic puppy! 🐶 I switched from a retractable leash after reading that it's dangerous, and it's so convenient and great! ㅎㅎ The hands-free design will be even more useful in winter~ The red color is also pretty so I'm torn about getting that too ˃̵͈̑ ᴗ ˂̵͈̑

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
너무너무 이쁩니다 핸즈프리 처음 써보는데 너무 좋네요
아무래도 줄에 그림이 있다보니 코팅이되어있어 기존에 쓰던거보다 좀 미끄럽긴한데 것도 금방 적응됩니다 밤에도 오히려 알록달록해서 기존에 쓰던거보다 잘보이는거 같아요 매우 만족스럽습니다 아참 길이도 딱 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's so so pretty! This is my first time using a hands-free leash and I love it. Since the leash has a pattern with coating, it's a bit slippery compared to what I used before, but I'm getting used to it quickly. At night, the colorful pattern actually stands out better than my old one. I'm very satisfied! Oh, and the length is just right!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 리쉬 줄 길어서 크로스로 사용해도 불편하지 않아서 너무 좋아요 풉 백도 포인트 되고 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The leash is long enough that I can wear it crossbody without any trouble, which is great! The poop bag holder is also a nice detail and so cute!

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content: 울 둥이한테 사이즈도 맞고 너무 이쁘네요~
reviews.content_en: It fits my pup perfectly and looks so pretty!~

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content:
하네스형 하네스 리뷰가 없어서, 살까말까 고민됬는데
정말 잘산 것 같습니다:) 
강아지가 불편하게 입는 하네스는 정말 싫어해서
가슴형 하네스로 애용하고 있는데 강아지가 편한지 금방
입더라구요. 그리고 줄 당김 심할 때 가끔 켁켁 되는데,
이 하네스는 괜찮은 것 같습니다. 
디자인도 너무 예쁘고 맘에들어요🌝👍
reviews.content_en: There weren't harness reviews, so I was debating whether to buy it, but I'm so glad I did! 😊 My pup really hates uncomfortable harnesses, so I usually use a chest-type harness, and she put this on so quickly because it's comfortable. Also, sometimes she coughs a bit when pulling hard on the leash, but this harness seems fine. The design is also so pretty and I love it! 🌝👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 목줄이 부드럽고 착용하기도 편해서 아주 좋아요~~~
reviews.content_en: The leash is soft and easy to put on, so it's really great~~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무예뻐요🖤
블랙 리드줄 코디하니 세트같네요💕착용간단해서 버클만 쓰는데 이뻐요 이뻐💕
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty! 🖤 It looks like a set when coordinated with the black leash 💕 It's simple to put on—just the buckle—and it looks amazing! So pretty 💕

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content: 하네스만 차다가 목줄을 처음 사용해봤는데!!강아지도 너무 편안해 하는것같아요!!!
reviews.content_en: This was my first time using a leash after only wearing a harness, and my pup seems so comfortable with it!!!

reviews.name: 도****
reviews.content:
이뻐요~  목줄이랑 세트로 잘샀네요
아이도 편해합니당
reviews.content_en: It's pretty! I got it with the leash as a set and it's perfect. My pup is comfortable with it too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 버클 목줄만 싸서 사본건데 넘 이쁘고 편해요❤️🖤
reviews.content_en: I just bought the buckle leash separately and it's so pretty and convenient! ❤️🖤

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송빠르고 블랙샀는데 가볍고 예뻐서 레드하나 더 구입했어요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping, and I got the black one which is lightweight and pretty, so I bought the red one too!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 제품이 귀엽고 튼튼하고 가벼워서 사용하기 너무 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The product is cute, durable, and lightweight, so it's great to use!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
지이인짜 기여워요.. 다른제품이랑 고민하다가 리드줄 고리가 더 안전해보여서 구매결정했는데 잘한거같아요! 튼튼해보이네요 !!
핸드프리도 너무 편해요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's seriously adorable... I was debating between other products, but the leash ring looked safer so I decided to buy it and I'm so glad I did! It looks really durable!! The hands-free feature is also so convenient ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 패턴도 너무귀엽고 짱짱해서 너무좋아요 다른색으로도 구매할 예정입니다!ㅎㅎ잘샀어요
reviews.content_en: The pattern is so cute and the quality is amazing, so I love it! I'm planning to buy it in other colors too! ㅎㅎ Great purchase!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색감이 너무 예뻐요. 배송은 총알.
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty. Shipping was lightning fast.

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content: 전에 쓰던 바잇미 줄보다 가벼워요~ 어깨에 크로스해서 잘 쓰고 있어요:)
reviews.content_en: It's lighter than my previous BITE ME leash~ I wear it crossbody over my shoulder and it works great! :)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
오렌지색 샀다가 써보고 편해서 검은색 추가주문
기존에 쓰던 핸즈프리보다 조금 더 길어서 편합니다
reviews.content_en: I bought orange first, tried it, loved how convenient it was, so I ordered black as an additional purchase. It's a bit longer than the hands-free one I had before, which is more convenient.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
예쁘고 좋아요
줄 길이가 길어서 어깨에 크로스로 매고 산책했더니 편하네요
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and great. The leash is long, so I wear it crossbody over my shoulder for walks and it's so comfortable!

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content: 살이 쩌서 5kg에 가까워지니 타이트하네요ㅠ 그래도 하네스만 해도 귀엽고 깜찍합니다ㅎ
reviews.content_en: She's gotten chubby and is close to 5kg now so it's tight ㅠ But even just the harness alone is so cute and adorable ㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 엄청 편안해 해요 꼭 사세요
reviews.content_en: She's so comfortable in it. You should definitely buy it!

reviews.name: G****
reviews.content:
아주 맘에 들어요
바잇미꺼 여러가지 쓰고 있는데 핸즈프리 리드줄은 정말 최고
너무 편해요
reviews.content_en: I really like it. I use several BITE ME products and the hands-free leash is seriously the best. It's so convenient.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송받자마자 착용하고 산책다녀왔는데 빨간색 포인트되고 너무 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I put it on right after getting the package and went for a walk—the red color is such a nice accent and it's amazing!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
기존 마카롱 리드줄 이용하다가 너무 좋아서 새로나온 팝콘 목줄 구매햇어요

전꺼 보다 확실히 가볍고 좋아요!!!
reviews.content_en: I used the macaron leash before and loved it so much that I bought the new popcorn leash! It's definitely lighter and better than the previous one!!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
우리 강아지 털색이랑 완전 찰떡! 퍼스널컬러임
하네스만 쓰다가 목줄 산책 처음 해봤는데 첨엔 싫어하더니 금방 적응하네요
reviews.content_en: The color is absolutely perfect for my pup's coat color—like it was made for her! This is my first time using a leash after only wearing a harness, and while she didn't like it at first, she's adjusted quickly.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 튼튼하고 화려해용 근데 약간 큰듯
reviews.content_en: It's durable and colorful! But it seems a bit big.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 핸즈프리 편해서 여기저기 사모으는중인데 중간에 연결클립한개 더있어서 친구들냄새 맡을때 풀수있으면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: The hands-free feature is so convenient that I'm collecting them from different places. It would be great if there was an extra connecting clip so I could unclip it when my friends want to smell it.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색이 쨍하니 귀여워요:) 목줄차고 산책은 처음해보는데 괜찮네요. 여름에 많이 사용할것같아요.
reviews.content_en: The color is so vibrant and cute :) This is my first time using a collar for walks and it's working out well. I think I'll use it a lot in the summer.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 디자인,재질 마음에 들어요 사고나니 3천원정도 가격을 할인해서 좀 늦게살걸 후회중
reviews.content_en: I love the design and material. Now that I bought it, I'm regretting not buying it earlier since the price dropped by about 3,000 won.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 목줄세트 샀다가 디자인이 맘에들어 가슴줄 하네스도 세트로 샀어요 튼튼하고 좋습니다 👍👍
reviews.content_en: I bought a leash set first, but loved the design so much that I also got the chest harness set. It's sturdy and great 👍👍

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 아직 쓰진 않았지만 가방이랑 세트로 구매했는데 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet, but I bought it as a set with a bag and it's adorable.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 예뻐요 잘 받았습니다 :)
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and I received it well :)

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 예뻐요 잘 받았습니다 :)
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and I received it well :)

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
완전 봄봄봄 하네요~
산책하다보면 다들 귀욥다고 쳐다보네요!
reviews.content_en: It's so spring-y~ When I'm out on walks, everyone stops to say how cute it is!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
8개월차 2키로 미니비숑한테는 조금 큰 감이 있어요!
최대한 줄여도 맨몸에는 헐렁여요
가을 겨울에 두께있는 옷 입을때 사용할 용도로 산 하네스라 살용하는덴 문제 없음!
다만 울 애기가 몸에 거적대기 걸치는거 싫어해서 적응하는데 시간 걸릴거 같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My 8-month-old 2kg mini Bichon finds it a bit big! Even when I adjust it as small as possible, it's loose on a bare body. I got this harness to use during fall and winter when wearing thicker clothes, so it works fine for that purpose! But my baby doesn't like having things draped on, so it might take some time to adjust 😅

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 목에만 채우는걸 처음 사봤어요. 곧 익숙해지겠죠~
reviews.content_en: This is my first time trying a collar-only style. I'm sure we'll get used to it soon~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 다 좋은데 목줄 사이즈가 커요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Everything's good except the collar size is too big ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지 목줄 리드줄 같이 구입해서 색깔까지 이쁘고 디자인도 이쁘고 튼튼하기 까지 최고입니다!
reviews.content_en: I purchased the dog collar and leash together, and the colors are pretty, the design is pretty, and it's sturdy too—it's the best!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지 목줄 리드줄 너무 튼튼하고 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: The dog collar and leash are so sturdy and pretty!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 예뻐요 튼튼해서 더 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and pretty, and it's even better because it's sturdy!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
어깨에 두르니까 두손이 자유로워서
너무편하고 푹신하게 제작되어서
아프지 않아요
reviews.content_en: When I wear it over my shoulder, both my hands are free, so it's super convenient and since it's made with cushioning, it doesn't hurt.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
레드 하려다가 블랙으로 했는데 잘 선택한거같아요
너무너무 마음에 듭니다!!!
reviews.content_en: I was going to go with red but chose black instead, and it looks like a good choice. I absolutely love it!!!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 너무너무 예쁘고 좋아요,목줄 하나로 포인트 되고 어느 옷에도 잘 어울려요
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty and good. The collar serves as a nice accent piece and goes well with any outfit.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 굵기도 딱 좋고 색상도 이뻐서 맘에 들어요!
reviews.content_en: The thickness is just right and the color is pretty—I'm happy with it!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 진짜 튼튼하고 좋아요 귀엽고 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: It's really sturdy and good. It's cute and pretty!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
강아지가 소형견이라 그런지 리드줄이 두껍고 무거운감이 좀 있어요.
프린팅이 귀여워서 산건데 퀄리티가 막 좋진 않아요 (줄이 겹쳐진 구간에 프린팅이 흐려보여요)
같이 산 풉백은 새로 뜯은 똥봉투 간신히 들어가는 느낌이고, 키링은 생각보다 크고 무거웠어요
디자인 우선으로는 만족스럽지만 무게나 크기는 아쉽네요
reviews.content_en: Since my dog is small, the leash is thick and feels a bit heavy. I bought it because the printing is cute, but the quality isn't that great (the printing looks blurry where the leash overlaps). The poop bag holder that came with it barely fits a new poop bag, and the keychain is bigger and heavier than I expected. I'm satisfied with the design overall, but I'm disappointed with the weight and size.
